1.title: Half-Life: Alyx
1.description: The legendary Half-Life series returns in virtual reality. Play as Alyx Vance in an exciting adventure.

2.title: Beat Saber
2.description: A rhythm game where you slash blocks with lightsabers to the beat of music. Great workout and entertainment!

3.title: The Walking Dead: Saints & Sinners
3.description: Survival in a post-apocalyptic zombie world. Make decisions that affect the story.

4.title: Superhot VR
4.description: Time moves only when you move. Unique gameplay in action movie style.

5.title: Boneworks
5.description: A physics simulator with advanced physics. Explore the world, solve puzzles and fight.

6.title: Pistol Whip
6.description: A combination of rhythm game and shooter. Shoot to the beat of music, dodge bullets.

7.title: Blade & Sorcery
7.description: Realistic melee combat simulator with magic. Fight enemies in a physics-based action game.

8.title: Moss
8.description: A charming adventure with a mouse named Quill. Unique blend of platformer and puzzle.

9.title: Population: One
9.description: Battle royale in virtual reality. Fight other players in large-scale battles.

10.title: Job Simulator
10.description: A work simulator set in the future where robots have replaced humans. Fun and relaxing game.

11.title: Asgard's Wrath
11.description: Epic RPG in Norse mythology. Fight gods and monsters in a grand adventure.

12.title: Lone Echo
12.description: Space adventure with zero gravity. Explore a space station and uncover mysteries.

13.title: Arizona Sunshine
13.description: Survival in the Arizona desert full of zombies. Cooperative mode for 2-4 players.

14.title: The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim VR
14.description: The legendary RPG now in virtual reality. Explore the vast world of Skyrim in VR.

15.title: Vader Immortal
15.description: Epic adventure in the Star Wars universe. Fight Darth Vader and learn the Force.

16.title: Gorn
16.description: Bloody gladiator simulator with exaggerated physics. Fight in the arena in cartoon style.

17.title: Until You Fall
17.description: Rhythmic action game with roguelike elements. Fight monsters to the beat of music.

18.title: I Expect You To Die
18.description: Spy puzzle game in James Bond style. Solve puzzles and survive dangerous situations.

19.title: Onward
19.description: Realistic tactical shooter with team play. Coordinate actions with teammates.

20.title: The Room VR: A Dark Matter
20.description: Mysterious puzzle game in Victorian style. Explore rooms and solve mysteries.
